claim: No Stable, pixel-export, image-security, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: An informative native img is paired with a focusable named crop group, native range zoom, and optional native number fields.
semantics.naming: Visible label and description name the crop region; numeric labels are visible and localizable.
semantics.roleOverride: No misleading two-dimensional slider role is applied; the crop group describes its custom arrow-key model.

interaction.keyboard: Arrows move one step, Shift+Arrow moves ten steps, Home moves to block/inline start, End moves to block/inline end; native zoom and optional number fields remain available.
interaction.pointer: Direct manipulation captures one primary pointer and commits normalized coordinates; pointer cancellation ends the gesture without a hidden action.
interaction.touch: touch-action is limited to the crop stage; numeric and range alternatives remain available when enabled.
interaction.speech: Visible coordinate labels and Zoom are deterministic voice targets.
interaction.switchAccess: Optional numeric controls provide sequential non-spatial adjustment.

formBehavior: Optional name serializes a normalized JSON crop plan. Reset restores the initial default plan; no pixel bytes or transformed image are submitted.

preferences.forcedColors: System boundaries and Highlight focus remain; obscuring shade and guide lines disappear.
preferences.reducedMotion: Crop changes are immediate and all descendant motion duration is removed.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Preview moves below the stage and numeric fields auto-fit.

consumerResponsibilities: Authorize, decode, orient, color-manage, and validate source image bytes outside the component.
Translate normalized crop values into pixels with a reviewed imaging pipeline and preserve the original for recovery.
Enable a numeric or equivalent non-spatial path for workflows requiring exact crop editing.
limitations: No rotation, EXIF orientation, pixel export, image decoding, metadata stripping, or server upload is implemented.
Complete Risk Class 3 manual, packed-consumer, and parity evidence remains unrecorded.
